perturbation.original_text: For purposes of this Agreement, the following terms shall have the following meanings, and to the extent not defined in this section or otherwise in this Agreement, a term shall have the meaning ascribed to it in any of the Other Agreements: Source: CONFORMIS INC, 10-Q, 11/1/2019 "Acceptance" and "Accept" have the meaning set forth in Article 3.4 of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: For purposes of this Agreement, the following terms shall have the following meanings, and to the extent not defined in this section or otherwise in this Agreement, a term shall have the meaning ascribed to it in any of the Other Agreements: Source: CONFORMIS INC, 10-Q, 11/1/2019 "Acceptance" and "Agreeance" have the meaning set forth in Article 3.4 of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: Changing "Accept" to "Agreeance" introduces inconsistency. Throughout the document, 'Acceptance' is tied to specific criteria and a formal process. The introduction of 'Agreeance' creates ambiguity as to whether it's synonymous with 'Acceptance' or represents a different level of agreement, causing uncertainty in the contract's enforceability. The definitions in Article I provides the definition of what Acceptance is, and now, with this introduction of another word, that wasn't defined, it creates an in-text contradiction. Also, because the agreement is meant to be effective only when all the deliverables are met in Milestone #1 and #2 in Article VIII, this will create a great uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The term of this Agreement shall begin as of the Effective Date and continue until Acceptance of all Deliverables for Milestones #1 and #2 pursuant to Section 3.4 and completion of Milestone #3, unless earlier terminated under Section 8.2, as provided for under the Other Agreements, or as mutually agreed by the Parties.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Accept' to 'Agreeance' introduces a new, undefined term into the contract. The contradicted text explicitly states that the agreement's term continues until 'Acceptance' of deliverables. Because 'Agreeance' is undefined, it is unclear whether it has the same legal weight as 'Acceptance' and if the deliverables need to be under the same process as Article 3.4. This creates a direct contradiction as it creates uncertainty regarding the conditions of fulfilling contractual obligations, thus leading to a contradiction, in accordance with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology'.

perturbation.original_text: Stryker shall pay to Conformis the following milestone payments for the development work to be conducted hereunder if and when the following milestones are met, as follows: (a) Milestone #1 - Within thirty (30) days following the date on which Stryker receives the first prototype of the Patient- Specific Instrumentation delivered to it by Conformis in accordance with the R&D Work Plan, Stryker shall pay to Conformis a total of two million U.S. dollars ($2,000,000); and 10 Source: CONFORMIS INC, 10-Q, 11/1/2019 (b) Milestone #2 - Within thirty (30) days following the date on which there is a design freeze of the Patient-Specific Instrumentation for the KIB Product in accordance with the R&D Work Plan, Stryker shall pay to Conformis a total of three million U.S dollars ($3,000,000).
perturbation.changed_text: Stryker shall pay to Conformis the following milestone payments for the development work to be conducted hereunder if and when the following milestones are met, as follows: (a) Milestone #1 - Within thirty (30) days following the date on which Stryker receives the first prototype of the Patient- Specific Instrumentation delivered to it by Conformis in accordance with the R&D Work Plan, Stryker shall contribute to Conformis a total of two million U.S. dollars ($2,000,000); and 10 Source: CONFORMIS INC, 10-Q, 11/1/2019 (b) Milestone #2 - Within thirty (30) days following the date on which there is a design freeze of the Patient-Specific Instrumentation for the KIB Product in accordance with the R&D Work Plan, Stryker shall pay to Conformis a total of three million U.S dollars ($3,000,000).
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'pay' to 'contribute' in Milestone #1, it introduces an ambiguity about the nature of this financial transfer. While 'pay' implies a contractual obligation for services rendered as per the Development Agreement, 'contribute' can suggest a voluntary contribution, potentially impacting Stryker's legal duty to provide the full amount for the first milestone. This could lead to disputes about whether Stryker's obligation for Milestone #1 is legally enforceable. It also creates an in-text contradiction, since the file has Milestone #2 still with pay. This creates an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Stryker shall make all payments to Conformis required herein by wire transfer in accordance with the Wire Instructions. Such payments are non-refundable and non-creditable except as set forth in the Other Agreements.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'pay' to 'contribute' in Milestone #1 introduces a contradiction. The original text and contradicted text both use the word 'payments' to describe the financial obligation from Stryker to Conformis. By changing 'pay' to 'contribute', it creates ambiguity about whether Stryker is legally required to transfer the funds and whether it is considered a payment. The contradicted text states 'Stryker shall make all payments to Conformis required herein...', implying a mandatory obligation, while 'contribute' suggests a voluntary act. This inconsistency creates a direct contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Each Party agrees, subsequent to the execution and delivery of this Agreement and without any additional consideration, to execute, acknowledge and deliver such further documents and instruments, and to do all such other acts, as may be necessary or appropriate in order to carry out the purposes and intent of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Each Party agrees, subsequent to the execution and delivery of this Agreement and without any additional consideration, to execute, acknowledge and deliver such further documents and instruments, and to do all such other acts, as may be necessary or appropriate in order to carry out the aspirations and intent of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'purposes' with 'aspirations' in this clause creates an in-text contradiction, since the file has milestones based on deliverables, this creates an objective obligation. Also, since the agreement is meant to be effective only when all the deliverables are met in Milestone #1 and #2 in Article VIII, this will create a great uncertainty, since both parties have no longer the objective scope, but instead an aspiration one.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The term of this Agreement shall begin as of the Effective Date and continue until Acceptance of all Deliverables for Milestones #1 and #2 pursuant to Section 3.4 and completion of Milestone #3, unless earlier terminated under Section 8.2, as provided for under the Other Agreements, or as mutually agreed by the Parties.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'purposes' with 'aspirations.' This introduces a contradiction because the contradicted text clearly defines the term of the agreement based on the 'Acceptance of all Deliverables for Milestones #1 and #2.' Changing 'purposes' to 'aspirations' undermines the objective nature of the deliverables, creating uncertainty and conflicting with the clear milestone-based completion criteria outlined in the contradicted text. The deliverables become subjective, based on the party's 'aspirations' which are not defined, instead of a measurable purpose. The 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' perturbation definition is applicable here since the changed text creates conflicting obligations.
